title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.290 - Compensation of officer
text:
521.290.  Compensation of officer. — When property is seized on attachment, the court may allow to the officer having charge thereof such compensation for his trouble and expenses in keeping the same as shall be reasonable and just.
(RSMo 1939 § 1466) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1302; 1919 § 1753; 1909 § 2322
